literal_meaning: bhikkhus, there are these four knots
preferred_translation: bhikkhus, there are these four knots
definition: A family-heading formula for the four knots.
notes: Use this phrase record when the heading appears as a whole. It should inherit the gantha headword policy and keep the knot image stable across the family.

example_phrases.translation: bhikkhus, there are these four knots
example_phrases.notes: Standard heading for the knot family.
